name: Abatement of Interest on Erroneous Refund Checks

eligibility.description: The erroneous refund must not exceed $50,000 and the taxpayer (or related party) must not have caused the refund error.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The IRS must abate interest on an erroneous refund until the date they demand repayment, provided the taxpayer did not cause the error.
